annotation_target.structure: Sixth phrase consequent — completion, approaching the final section
teaching_goals: prepare the listener for the approaching ending without telegraphing it

teaching_notes.note: The same quiet arrival — Satie offers no announcement of the ending.

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 47–50 of Gymnopedie No. 1 (continuation of mm. 43–46), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 47–50 and describe the completion.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 47–50.
Measures 47–50 complete the phrase group quietly. Let me loop mm. 47–50.
Satie Gymnopedie No. 1 mm. 47–50: sixth phrase consequent. Pairs with mm. 43–46.
